headline: Woman Accidentally 'Likes' Her Boss's Post From 2015, Now She's 'Taking A Mental Health Day'
summary: The post was a photo of his cat. She has never mentioned cats. HR is 'aware.'
fullBody: Jessica Scrolldeep accidentally liked her boss's 2015 photo of his cat, Mr. Whiskers. 'I was 47 photos deep,' Jessica whispered. 'I didn't even know he had a cat.' She unliked it immediately, then worried unliking was 'more suspicious.' Jessica called in sick the next day. Her boss emailed 'hope you feel better, also Mr. Whiskers says hi.' Jessica has started looking for new jobs. Mr. Whiskers has been promoted.
